_comment: reviewer/auditor mode (godreview) — additive + tightened. Adds 'sign-off' claim words (LGTM/clean/no issues/safe to merge/approved) and review/audit verification commands (linters, static analysis, security scanners, test runs, grep/diff). reReadClears:false so seeing your own edit is not proof — if you applied a fix and call it clean, a verification command must have RUN. Pure read-only reviews don't mutate files, so they're structurally gate-exempt; the contract still binds report quality (verify every finding, separate confirmed/suspected, refute before keeping).
_testCmdNote: Review verification: linters / typecheckers / static-analysis / security scanners / a test run, or a grep/rg/git-diff that demonstrates a finding (or that an applied fix took). Pure narration ('I reviewed it') is not a run — a command must have executed post-edit.
